import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Schedule a transformation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/transform/schedule"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Schedule a transformation job from a server-side file path, SFTP server, S3 bucket,
or local path. The job can run immediately, after a delay, or on a recurring cron
schedule.

Use `runOnce: true` + `delayMs: 0` for immediate one-shot execution.
Use `cronExpression` for recurring schedules (e.g. `0 2 * * *` for 2 AM daily).
